CustomField.formula:
IF (IsPickVal (SW_Industry__c,"Finance"),10,0)
+
IF (Employees_Min__c>4999,25, IF (Employees_Min__c>999,20, IF (Employees_Min__c>499,5, 1))) +
IF ( IsBlank (Estimated_Visitors__c) || Estimated_Visitors__c=0 ,0, IF (Estimated_Visitors__c>9999999,25, IF (Estimated_Visitors__c>4999999,20, IF (Estimated_Visitors__c>2999999,7, IF (Estimated_Visitors__c>999999,5, IF (Estimated_Visitors__c>499999,3, IF (Estimated_Visitors__c>0,1,0 )))))))
+SWTech_Score__c
CustomField.label: Maturity Score
